title: Ex-Celsius CEO Mashinsky gets U.S. CFTC ban in final resolution with regulator
summary: Alexander Mashinsky, the founder of failed crypto lender Celsius, had earlier been imprisoned for fraud and is now formally banned from CFTC registration.

title: U.S. agencies seek stablecoin customer-ID rules akin to banks in new GENIUS Act pitch
summary: The Federal Reserve, Treasury and other regulators have issued a proposed rule that would set identification standards, and it's now open for public comments.

title: Ethereum Foundation loses another key leader as co-executive director Hsiao-Wei Wang resigns
summary: Wang's departure follows the resignation of fellow co-executive director Tomasz Stańczak and marks the latest in a string of high-profile exits at the EF.

title: Crypto for Advisors: Trading the bitcoin cycle
summary: Bitcoin’s 4-year cycle makes DCA costly. Learn why a cycle-smart strategy is essential for advisors to better manage volatility and maximize client returns.

title: Algorand unveils roadmap to achieve quantum resistance by 2028
summary: The announcement reflects a crypto's growing recognition that adopting quantum-resistant cryptography could take years, requiring changes not only to user wallets but also to core protocol infrastructure.
